title: SoFi Technologies Q3 2024 Earnings Summary
text: SoFi Technologies delivered strong third-quarter results, with revenue reaching $697.1 million, representing a substantial 35% increase year-over-year. The company achieved profitability with net income of $60.7 million, a remarkable turnaround from the $276.9 million loss recorded in the same period last year. The company's earnings per share came in at $0.057, compared to a loss of $0.29 per share in Q3 2023. The profit margin improved to 8.7%, driven primarily by the higher revenue generation. Revenue exceeded analyst estimates by 8.8% while earnings per share surpassed analyst estimates by 25%. Looking forward, SoFi is positioned for continued expansion, with forecasts indicating 13% annual revenue growth over the next three years. This outpaces the broader consumer finance industry's projected 11% annual growth rate in the United States. Despite the positive earnings beat, the company's stock performance remained modest, declining 1.0% over the week following the announcement.
